label: Negative fishing outcome
description: Defines a negative outcome that can occur while fishing. The outcome is eligible when the water body's fish list contains the specified fish type. A letter is always sent; damage and hediff application are optional.

fishType.label: Fish type
fishType.description: Fish ThingDef that must be present in the water body's common or uncommon fish list for this outcome to be eligible.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Title shown on the letter sent when this outcome triggers. Supports grammar tokens.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the letter sent when this outcome triggers. Supports grammar tokens such as {PAWN_nameDef}.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: Letter type controlling the icon style and severity shown in the message pane.

damageDef.label: Damage def
damageDef.description: Optional damage type applied to the fishing pawn. When absent, no direct damage is dealt.

damageAmountRange.label: Damage amount range
damageAmountRange.description: Range in the compact min~max format from which the damage amount is drawn. Only meaningful when damageDef is set.

addsHediff.label: Adds hediff
addsHediff.description: Optional hediff applied to the fishing pawn after damage. Applied regardless of whether damageDef is set.

hediffSeverity.label: Hediff severity
hediffSeverity.description: When positive, overwrites the severity of the hediff added by addsHediff. Ignored when addsHediff is not set.

basic-negative-fishing-outcome.label: Basic negative fishing outcome
basic-negative-fishing-outcome.description: Minimal negative fishing outcome with the fields needed for the runtime to send a letter.
